name: Why We ❤️ Google's Helpful Content Update w/Steve Wiideman
episode_summary: Specializing in strategic planning for multi-location and franchise brands, Steve Wiideman, of Wiideman Consulting Group, considers himself a scientist and practitioner of local and e-commerce search engine optimization and paid search advertising. He is also the author of SEO Strategy & Skills, a college textbook through Stukent.
episode_summary_rich_text:
How can you use Google's algorithm and updates to your advantage? Steve Wiideman comes back for part 2, to teach us:

  • How to leverage Google's helpful content update to funnel traffic
  • SEO ranking factors and how to build a digital marketing strategy
  • Great case studies of what SEO success looks like
